concerns: Plan step 6 references `fingerprint-receipt.ts` but the actual path is `src/modules/fingerprint/fingerprint-receipt.ts`
Lazy loading of html2canvas is mentioned only in risks but not implemented in any step — step 3 should use dynamic `import()` to comply with CLAUDE.md's lightweight bundle requirement
iOS Safari download fallback is identified as a risk but no implementation step includes the `window.open()` fallback for mobile browsers
Plan omits running `npm run policy:check` (or `npm run build`) to verify the new html2canvas dependency passes the architecture validation script
